A DHCP packet walks into a bar and asks for a beer. Bartender says, "here, but I’ll need that back in an hour!"
Why do C# and Java developers keep breaking their keyboards? Because they use a strongly typed language.
Why did the developer go broke buying Bitcoin? He kept calling it bytecoin and didn't get any.
The punchline often arrives before the set-up. Do you know the problem with UDP jokes?
An IPv6 packet is walking out of the house. He goes nowhere.
Why did the programmer always carry a pencil? They preferred to write in C#.
Which song would an exception sing? Can't catch me - Avicii
Why was the JavaScript developer sad? He didn't know how to null his feelings.
Why did the developer quit his job? Because he didn't get arrays.
I was gonna tell you a joke about UDP... ...but you might not get it.
Is there a hole in your shoe? No… Then how’d you get your foot in it?
Why are mummys scared of vacation? They're afraid to unwind.
What was a more important invention than the first telephone? The second one.
Why did the rooster cross the road? He heard that the chickens at KFC were pretty hot.
What do you call someone with no nose? Nobody knows.
Did you watch the new comic book movie? It was very graphic!
What did the traffic light say to the car as it passed? Don't look I'm changing!
What do you give a sick lemon? Lemonaid.
What did the judge say to the dentist? Do you swear to pull the tooth, the whole tooth and nothing but the tooth?
Why do valley girls hang out in odd numbered groups? Because they can't even.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Opportunity. That is impossible. Opportunity doesn’t come knocking twice!

 Who's there? 
 A broken pencil. 
 A broken pencil who? Never mind. It's pointless.

 Who's there? 
 Cows go. 
 Cows go who? No, cows go moo.

 Who's there? 
 Hatch. 
 Hatch who? Bless you!

 Who's there? 
 Little old lady.
